goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get attraction type and postcode
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction and should have a star of 4
Make sure you get address and phone number
